initiatives.name: Mendocino County Safe Space Project
initiatives.description: Local chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice, a group that organizes white people for anti-racism.

initiatives.name: Mendocino County AIDS/Viral Hepatitis Network (MCAVHN)
initiatives.description: Providing services & comfort to persons affected by substance use disorders, behavioral health conditions, the provision of harm reduction services.
